---
title: "Research & Discussion"
subtitle: "Paper reviews, methodological notes, and research write-ups."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 10
  max-items: 50
page-layout: full
---

Notes from ongoing work in microbiology, antimicrobial PK/PD, bioinformatics, and related data analysis.
